name: United Blood Nation
description: The United Blood Nation (East Coast Bloods) is a street and prison gang formed on July 16, 1993 at Rikers Island by Leonard 'OG Dead Eye' McKenzie, who allied gangs to protect against dominant Hispanic gangs. The East Coast faction of the California Bloods, UBN has 7,000-15,000 members and became the dominant East Coast gang in the 1990s. Co-founder Omar Portee was sentenced to 50 years at ADX Florence. Subgroups include Nine Trey Gangsters and Sex Money Murder. The 6ix9ine/Nine Trey RICO case in 2018 drew widespread media attention.
